project.name: Puzzled
project.summary: Puzzled is a production puzzle-game application repo owning the Puzzled Next.js app, repo-local SDK/UI integration, Atlas migrations, Sylphx deployment manifest, and application-specific game/user workflows.
goals: Ship the Puzzled game application with reliable app, database, auth, settings, analytics, and deployment behavior.
Keep Puzzled-specific product behavior inside this repo and use external projects only through documented public contracts.
Maintain safe Atlas migration and Sylphx deployment evidence for production changes.
nonGoals: Own Sylphx Platform core behavior or shared SDK semantics beyond repo-local integration.
Encode another product's game or customer-specific behavior into this app.
Treat source revert as complete recovery after migrations or deploy side effects have run.

owns.name: puzzled-application
owns.description: The Next.js Puzzled application, game flows, settings/profile behavior, auth integration, analytics, and app-local tests.

owns.name: puzzled-deployment-and-data
owns.description: Sylphx deployment manifest, Dockerfile, Atlas migrations, database schema usage, and release-command behavior.

doesNotOwn: Sylphx Platform core PaaS/BaaS control-plane behavior, deployment controller internals, or shared billing ledger.
Shared SDK/UI semantics beyond repo-local consumption unless changed through their owning public contracts.
Sibling product domain models or customer-specific game behavior.

allowedDependencies.surface: Sylphx deployment, SDK, and platform contracts

forbiddenCouplings: Do not put Puzzled-specific behavior into shared SDK/UI packages without a generalized public contract.
Do not bypass Atlas migration checks or the Sylphx deployment manifest for production changes.
Do not treat source revert as complete recovery after migrations or deploy side effects.

delivery.deployPath: Sylphx deploy manifest in sylphx.toml builds apps/puzzled/Dockerfile and runs Atlas release_command before rollout.
delivery.productionProof: CI contexts, Atlas migration checksum proof, Sylphx deploy/readback evidence, app health smoke, and logs for runtime behavior changes.

commercial.pricingSourceOfTruth: Puzzled product configuration and Sylphx Platform billing surfaces
commercial.metricsSourceOfTruth: Puzzled analytics and platform deployment telemetry
guardrails: Pricing, packaging, game roadmap, and growth experiments require decision records backed by product and market evidence.
Commercial decisions must not leak into shared SDK/UI packages without a generalized contract.

gaps.description: CI path filters currently omit PROJECT.md, AGENTS.md, and .doctrine/**, so docs-only control-plane changes may not emit required contexts.
